tags.name: `mc-notification`
tags.description: Purpose: Display a notification message to the user Category: Content Display, Forms When to use: When you need to inform the user about an important event or action When not to use: For non-urgent messages or alerts Works with components: mc-button, mc-icon Alternative component names: Notification, Alert, Message Events: * `close` {`CustomEvent`} - Emitted when close icon is clicked. Slots: * ` ` {} - The body HTML to use for the notification text. * ``actions`` {} - The actions HTML to use for the notification. * ``icon`` {} - The actions HTML to use for the notification. Attributes: * `heading` {`string | undefined`} - Heading of the notification No heading will be shown, if attribute is not supplied. * `body` {`string | undefined`} - Body can be passed as simple argument like: `body="simple text"` or as a default slot: `body text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short body text, use named slot when you want to pass body with HTML text * `actions` {`Link[] | undefined`} - Actions can be passed as a named slot: `Action` or as an array of link objects: `[{url: "https://designsystem.maersk.com", label: "Design System"}]`. If you want an action link te be opened in a new tab, you can extend just pass extend action link object like: `[{url: "https://designsystem.maersk.com", label: "Design System", target: "_blank", rel: "noreferrer"}]` * `closable` {`boolean`} - Whether to display a close icon. * `appearance` {NotificationAppearance} - Appearance of the notification. Can be: `neutral-weak`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error` * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the notification. * `icon` {`string | undefined`} - Name of the icon. * `verticalalign` {`VerticalAlign | undefined`} - Vertical alignment of content within notification * `actionsposition` {`ActionsPosition | undefined`} - Position of the actions relative to the notification's content. * `width` {`string`} - Sets the width of the component. Remember also to specify the measurement unit i.e. `px`, `%`, `vw`, `fit-content` etc. Properties: * `hasSlotIcon` {`boolean`} - * `iconSlotElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - * `heading` {`string | undefined`} - Heading of the notification No heading will be shown, if attribute is not supplied. * `body` {`string | undefined`} - Body can be passed as simple argument like: `body="simple text"` or as a default slot: `body text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short body text, use named slot when you want to pass body with HTML text * `actions` {`Link[] | undefined`} - Actions can be passed as a named slot: `Action` or as an array of link objects: `[{url: "https://designsystem.maersk.com", label: "Design System"}]`. If you want an action link te be opened in a new tab, you can extend just pass extend action link object like: `[{url: "https://designsystem.maersk.com", label: "Design System", target: "_blank", rel: "noreferrer"}]` * `closable` {`boolean`} - Whether to display a close icon. * `appearance` {NotificationAppearance} - Appearance of the notification. Can be: `neutral-weak`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error` * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the notification. * `icon` {`string | undefined`} - Name of the icon. * `verticalalign` {`VerticalAlign | undefined`} - Vertical alignment of content within notification * `actionsposition` {`ActionsPosition | undefined`} - Position of the actions relative to the notification's content. * `width` {`string`} - Sets the width of the component. Remember also to specify the measurement unit i.e. `px`, `%`, `vw`, `fit-content` etc. * `handleClose` - Closes the notification

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description:
`heading` {`string | undefined`} - Heading of the notification
No heading will be shown, if attribute is not supplied.

Property: heading

attributes.name: body
attributes.description: `body` {`string | undefined`} - Body can be passed as simple argument like: `body="simple text"` or as a default slot: `body text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short body text, use named slot when you want to pass body with HTML text Property: body

attributes.name: actions
attributes.description: `actions` {`Link[] | undefined`} - Actions can be passed as a named slot: `Action` or as an array of link objects: `[{url: "https://designsystem.maersk.com", label: "Design System"}]`. If you want an action link te be opened in a new tab, you can extend just pass extend action link object like: `[{url: "https://designsystem.maersk.com", label: "Design System", target: "_blank", rel: "noreferrer"}]` Property: actions

attributes.name: closable
attributes.description:
`closable` {`boolean`} - Whether to display a close icon.

Property: closable

Default: false

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
`appearance` {NotificationAppearance} - Appearance of the notification.
Can be: `neutral-weak`, `info`, `success`, `warning`, `error`

Property: appearance

Default: neutral-weak

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the notification.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description:
`icon` {`string | undefined`} - Name of the icon.

Property: icon

attributes.name: verticalalign
attributes.description:
`verticalalign` {`VerticalAlign | undefined`} - Vertical alignment of content within notification

Property: verticalalign

Default: top

attributes.name: actionsposition
attributes.description:
`actionsposition` {`ActionsPosition | undefined`} - Position of the actions relative to the notification's content.

Property: actionsposition

Default: bottom

attributes.name: width
attributes.description:
`width` {`string`} - Sets the width of the component.
Remember also to specify the measurement unit i.e. `px`, `%`, `vw`, `fit-content` etc.

Property: width

Default: auto

attributes.name: onclose
attributes.description: `close` {`CustomEvent`} - Emitted when close icon is clicked.
